message:
fix(gateway): fix route ordering and cleanup bugs in reservation system

- Fix critical route ordering: move /stats before /:id to prevent matching
  "stats" as a reservation ID
- Remove unused imports (patternsOverlap, ReservationConflictEngine,
  ConflictCheckResult)
- Add debug logging for invalid glob patterns instead of silently swallowing
- Fix repeated expiring warnings: track warned reservations to avoid spam
- Clean up warning tracker when reservations are released or expire

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
